productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue washed and distressed jeans made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has a shaded look with a torn effect, two pockets on the front, two patch pockets at the back with thread detailing, belt loops on waistband, and a zipper and button closure on the front Fit Slim fit Regular rise Wash care Delicate machine wash cold Do not bleach, scrub, wring or tumble dry Hang dry in shade Warm iron Your failsafe, stretchable, slim-fit, day to night denim style is finally here! united colors of benetton has created this slim fit jeans with a cotton-spandex fabric to offer exemplary comfort and a flattering fit, while the torn effect adds to your hip look. Look fabulous by pairing this with t-shirts, kurtis or blouson tops and heels. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
